hero.heading:
Structured access.
Every level.
hero.copy: AREN offers a tiered service ecosystem for athletes and communities. From individual programming to full chapter activation — the standard scales to your context.

marquee.text: AREN ATHLETIC — NEW YORK CITY — DISCIPLINE AND PERFORMANCE — STREET MILES NYC — FIVE BOROUGH CHAPTER — STRUCTURED PERFORMANCE — AREN ATHLETIC COLLECTIVE — APPAREL BUILT FOR TRAINING —

services_list.heading: Structured access points built around the same standard.
services_list.copy: Each service is designed as a pathway into the AREN system — whether you need coaching, community, activation, or uniform support.

cards.title: 01 / Individual Programming
cards.description: Custom training programs built around the individual athlete's goals, schedule, and environment. Periodized, progressive, and designed for long-term development. Remote coaching available nationally.

cards.title: 02 / Group Training
cards.description: Structured group performance sessions built around discipline, accountability, and collective output. Ideal for teams, communities, and high-standard training environments.

cards.title: 03 / Street Miles Access
cards.description: Access to the community run system and chapter-based execution model. Designed for athletes who want to carry the standard into the streets.

cards.title: 04 / Hub Chapter Activation
cards.description: Frameworks for activating local AREN chapters with structure, protocols, and performance culture embedded from day one.

cards.title: 05 / Corporate + Team Performance
cards.description: High-accountability training and development systems for organizations and teams that require composure, execution, and consistent output.

cards.title: 06 / Apparel — Uniform Program
cards.description: Functional apparel systems for teams, communities, and operators who require durable design, restraint, and alignment with the AREN standard.

cta.heading: Building a scalable culture of community chapters across the nation.
cta.copy: AREN is evolving into a coordinated performance ecosystem, establishing elite training protocols and community expression while maintaining the absolute integrity of the standard.

cta_links.heading: Choose your access point.
cta_links.copy: Start with inquiry, explore training, or connect through Street Miles.
